text: According to the preventive maintenance procedure PM-VF4SS-007 (rev. 3), the CNC machining centre HAAS VF-4SS must be capable of Capability: spindle calibration at intervals not exceeding 1000 operating hours. The procedure requires: spindle warm-up (30 min), axis ballbar test (ISO 230-4), and laser calibration of all 5 axes. Estimated duration: 4 hours.

Maintenance procedure MP-CONV-012 (section 4.2) specifies that conveyor CBU-12 possesses the Capability: emergency stop response within 0.5 seconds of safety PLC signal activation. The E-stop test is mandatory after every belt replacement or motor overhaul and must be logged in the safety logbook.

The KUKA KR 210 R3100 robot is qualified for Capability: collaborative operation in restricted speed mode (ISO/TS 15066) with a monitored tool-centre-point speed limit of 250 mm/s and a safety-rated stop time < 100 ms as verified in the risk assessment RA-SW07-2023.

extractions.text: Capability: collaborative operation in restricted speed mode

text: Routine inspection procedure INS-ACS-002-Q (quarterly) verifies that air compressor ACS-02 retains Capability: pressure regulation within ±0.2 bar of setpoint 8.5 bar under full production load. Test includes: load test at 100% capacity for 2 hours, pressure gauge calibration check, and safety valve pop-test.

Per maintenance schedule MS-AGV-2024 (section 7), AGV controller AGV-CTRL-001 must support Capability: fleet path re-planning in under 200 ms to accommodate dynamic obstacles detected by the AGV LiDAR sensors. This capability is validated quarterly using the AGV Simulator Test Suite v3.2.
